_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of hair shaft progenitors that create a niche for hair pigmentation.

_contextSnippet: Krox20Cre; R26-rtTA; tetO-DTA mice had a complete arrest of new hair generation...Remarkable hair loss was observed in Krox20Cre; R26-rtTA; tetO-DTA mice at P50
details: Successfully depleted Krox20 lineage cells upon doxycycline induction, resulting in complete arrest of new hair generation and hair loss by P50
